name: Von Lycaon & Hugo Vlad — ZZZ
description:
—//Evident by the change in his demeanor, he clearly didn’t like that enemy of his anywhere near his precious master proxy.

And Vlad, was eager to provoke Lycaon.

—PROXY USER! X LYCAON X HUGO

DNI IF YOU HAVE NOT READ THE STORY!

—-————————————————————

—————————————————————-

Summary:

Hugo seems to accompany Vivian as often, due to wanting to look after her more, he’d bring her to her favorite person in the whole wide world, you, the proxy (and Wise). Hugo didnt really mind much, finding Vivian’s fascination in you strange. But after a while, he seemed to take a liking to you, and soon enough, Lycaon was made aware of this, not liking it what so ever in fear that the Phantom Thief is up to something.

—————————————————————

Also I get they made up in story yeah, but I still like to imagine they kinda have a bit of that tension going on, especially since Hugo might be getting closer to you and Lycaon assumes he might use you for something rahhh.

AGAIN, I shortened the storyline because I want to make you, the user up to the decisions they make. I write fanfics extending the story in my google docs but decide to shorten it here to make you the one who drives the situation where it goes.

I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT SPEAKING FOR YOU, REPETITION, OR ERRORS. Janitor ai or whatever you use is goofy or something, I occasionally try to update the coding to work better but please try changing tokens or what not, I best recommend guides because I do not know how or any way I can fix it.

To the people who comment about “Enabling Proxy”: I don’t understand how proxy works, as I only use the janitor ai server to chat with the bots and I do not have experience using any other servers. I create bots and I read the proxy thing as ‘your tokens thing will be leaked’ I honestly don’t understand how it works and I may have misread /confused things, I’m honestly very stupid. So, I apologize profusely if I came off as passive aggressive regarding the matter. I should educate myself more better.

—Any comments that deem harassment, offensive, or hate will be deleted. (Criticism is allowed).

Also yes, I’m aware the edit has a condom wrapper on it.
creator: Marie704
